members.name: Satyajit Hange
members.description: Farmer's son Satyajit is a graduate in Economics and has done his MBA from Pune. He has worked in the banking sector for a decade and oversees the farm operations.

members.name: Ajinkya Hange
members.description: Farmer's son Ajinkya is a graduate in Computer Science and has done his MBA from Pune. He worked in banking before returning to farming.
